## Make fast-ci failed
**Overall result:** FAILED (Exit code 1)
**Summary of issues found:**
1. **Prettier formatting issues** (2 files need formatting): - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
2. **Ruff formatting issue** (1 file needs reformatting): - `src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py`
**Detailed breakdown:**
| Component | Result | Notes | |-----------|--------|-------| | AGENTS.md check | PASSED | Standard check passed | | Lint (ruff) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Format check (ruff) | FAILED | 1 file would be reformatted: `src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py` | | Prettier check | FAILED | Code style issues found in 2 files | | Markdown check | PASSED | (no output) | | Exec reference check | PASSED | OK | | Type check (ty) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit tests (erk) | PASSED | 5902 passed in 23.63s | | Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | 136 passed in 4.65s | | Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | 115 passed in 0.87s | | Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED | 24 passed (incomplete output) |
**Root cause:** The make target failed because the format check detected that `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py` needs reformatting and 2 markdown files have formatting issues.
